feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 请问S/4 HANA有相关GMP认证中关于IOQ相关的材料吗
entry.content: IOQ是指验证设备安装和运行资格的过程术语，请问S/4 HANA有相关GMP认证中关于IOQ相关的材料吗

entry.title: #CoE#JMTHYbom行项目变更编号控制
entry.content: 做了校验增强，前台变更编号有值还是会报错、问下各位老师有什么解决办法

entry.title: DMC:Value XX cannot be converted; integer part can have maximum XX digits error for custom field
entry.content:
Hello,

One of my project while tyring to migrate customer I got the error message "Value 10 cannot be converted; integer part can have maximum 1 digits." for a numeric custom field that has 3 intiger and 2 decimal digits in conversion phase. 

None of the Length of data in that field is exceeding the given value. By the way in migration template the intiger part and decimal part is written as 3 and 2 but when there is a value more than 1 digit it gives above error.

How can I solve this issue?

entry.title: Mass maintenance of business partner
entry.content:
Hi all,

i would like to know if there is some possibility to create some fields and data through the new app Start/Manage Mass maintenance.

Issue is that in the old app Mass Maintenance Material(in this case we need to do mass maintenance of business partner) there is a possibility choose Data Record to be created.

In the new app, if the data doesnt exist, system will not create them. Is there any way to create these data in app Manage Mass Maintenance? When we started a process in new app, it was completed successfully, but  records were not created

Thx for help,

entry.title: Pricing procedure determination for Free of Charge process
entry.content: I work with the S4H public cloud, release 2402. In the free of charge process the order type is CBFD. The pricing procedure is Y40101 (for Croatia). I want to change the pricing procedure for this order type. In Central Business Configuration (CBC), in the 'Set Pricing Procedure Determination' menu (ID 101118), the procedure Y40101 is not mentioned. Also, when searching the document classification for pricing procedure determination field, none of the options seems relevant for the free of charge orders. How is the pricing procedure for the free of charge process (order type CBFD) determined?

entry.title: STO not showing in Monitor external and internal requirements Fiori app
entry.content:
In Monitor internal requirements and Monitor External requirements  Stock Transport Related Receipts not showing (PRqRel or Trn Res)

But in MD04 in under filter Requirements and stocks STP receipts showing 

My questions is STO is a requirement but why Fiori App not showing

entry.title: Dunning Procedure
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am setting up a customized Dunning process in a partner demo environment.
Therefore, I assigned a value to the BP item “Dunning Procedure”.
However, the input values could not be saved due to the following error.

Error:
No dunning settings have been maintained for company code 1510

So I wanted to set up SSCUI 105758 (Manage Dunning Control for Company Codes).
However, this SSCUI is restricted to new entries and does not allow new company codes to be registered.
How can this problem be resolved?

entry.title: Automatic account determination
entry.content:
Dear community,

Our client have a special requirement for the account determination on material on S4 Public Cloud.

He needs to have the following schemes :

For material entry :

Debit on stock account (BSX)

Credit on supplier account  (WRX)


For stock consumption :

Debit on charge account (EKG)

Credit on stock (BSX)

 

For invoice entry :

Debit on supplier account (WRX)

Credit on final supplier account

 

Usually, EKG is used for material entry, not for stock consumption.

 

They do not use stock variation account.

My question is can we change on Public cloud the standard schemes  ?

Thank you for your help!

 

Kind regards,

entry.title: Unable to create E-Way Bill for Sub Contracting Challan in S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi My SAP Family,

Can we generate E-Document Cockpit(India E-Way Bill) for Sub Contract Challan document(PO Process).

Please guide me.

Thanks and Regards,

Mansoor

entry.title: How to create a Sales Order in the new fiori application with configurable materials ?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and am not able to access the modification feature of characteristic values for configurable materials which is the following screen, when creating and/or editing a sales order in the new fiori application: 

In the "change Sales Order", when adding a new item to my Sales Order with a configurable material => I was expecting to have the popup above to be able to modify the configuration variant data! 

But no popup is displayed.

Then If I go to the "display sales order" => I can see a "configuration column" for configurable materials:

This "configuration column" is displayed in the "display SO" new fiori app, but IS NOT not shown when switching to the Edit mode) => is that normal? something is missing or this is a bug to raise to SAP?

On the other hand, if I use the "change Sales Order - VA02" application from whitin the fiori launchpad, I can see the "old" configuration button which allows me to access the variant configuration modification feature: 

Is this feature "hidden"? "not available" yet?

Thanks all

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Cloud - how to add multiple filters to expression-based filter in custom CDS view
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to add multiple filters in expression based. Where can I find any documentation about the syntax and examples?

 

 

 

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: I am unable to create E-way bill for Subcontracting Challan
entry.content:
Hi SAP Family,

I am unable to create E-Way Bill in E-Document Cockpit based on Delivery challan.

We are creating Delivery challan using Outbound Delivery number for Subcontracting process.

Please guide me or suggest me any documents (SAP documents) related to this.

entry.title: Milestone Billing - SAP SD
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to replicate PS Milestone Billing Scenario in Public Cloud. However, I cannot find any option to create Milestone at WBS or Network Activities. But In the Billing Plan tab of Sales Order I find the Milestone option and when I click on it, it gives me to choose between WBS/ Network. 

Firstly, I wanted to know if we could create Milestones at WBS/ Activities and Second, I wanted to know if there are any CBC configs required for Milestone Billing from Professional Services/Project Management.

Customer is an AD service company, and we are going to use Milestone Billing solution in place.

When I create a Sales Order line item there is two options one for Create Dates and one for Milestones and it is asking for Network and WBS element. I have no clue what these are and how to create them. 

Or is it possible to create a milestone billing plan without Project Systems?

Could somebody guide me with the above, thank you!

-Brinda S

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP Commercial Project Management for SAP S/4HANA SAP Commercial Project Management

entry.title: SAP Landscape Transformation , Enterprise edition replacement Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi

What is the Private Cloud equivalent for the On-premise 7018629 SAP Landscape Transformation , Enterprise edition to enable the Profit centre Re-org tool in ECC? as per on-premise note:(see SAP notes 1810605 (1810605 - General information about profit center reorganization - SAP for Me) and 1534197 (1534197 - SAP LT: Transformation Solution - Profit Center Reorganization - SAP for Me)

entry.title: MB51 Report Fields in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

The MB51 report in the public cloud is missing important fields like Receiving Storage Location, G/L Account, Receiving Batch, and Receiving Material etc. These fields are essential for the client's requirements.

Is there a way to get to these fields from the MB51 report on the public cloud?

thanks / Suresh.E

entry.title: Invoice issue for 3rd party without shipping notification
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

We are facing a major issue as part of Sales Processing using Third-Party without Shipping Notification (BDK) where system is copying the item quantity from Vendor invoice without any subsequent checks which is resulting in Invoices generated for a different quantity from Sales Order.

For example, we have a sales order where item 10 has quantity as 50. Order is saved, a purchase requisition was automatically created. Then the Purchase order generated with reference to requisition. 

The issue: Accidentally, we processed the Vendor invoice incorrectly with quantity as 50,000 instead of 50 by mistake. As soon as this was created, the Billing date on Sales order was updated and an Order related billing document was generated with 50,000 quantities. Now a customer invoice was incorrectly processed for 50,000 quantities, and the amount was automatically calculated as per the pricing condition records maintained in the system, rather than the price populated on the Vendor invoice.

Question: When creating the customer invoice in the Create Billing Documents app, shouldn't be there a safety checks or tolerance limit in these cases? Now SAP is automatically populating the quantity from Vendor invoice without any checks.

Please can you investigate the reason this has happened?

Thanks and regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Commissions - External Sales Representative (2TT)
entry.content:
Good Afternoon, 

Can we define a new condition contract type for an External commission agent?

Thank You

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: CDS VIEW Project Responsible Person name on SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 
we are trying to insert Project Responsible name on CDS to view all project managers in the report, but the element we add on CDS doesn't actually work. we joint it with the WBSElementBasicData and we opened the element as semantic element with "text", but still doesn't work. 


Does anyone know how to make it work ?

entry.title: Exchange Rate Conversion for Company Code Currency
entry.content:
In standard S/4HANA systems, M is the standard translation currency type for company code currency translation, and it cannot be altered for any specific company codes:

There is a legal requirement for specific countries to use rates provided by the national banks. It means, instead of usual Reuters rates (scope item 1S4) updating the exchange rate type “M”, a new source for foreign currency exchange rates will be needed in our current project for those countries.

We have followed this SAP documentation: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/currency-conversion-with-prescribed-exchange-rates/ba-p/12845598.

We proceed with all customizing suggested; however, this S/4 HANA Public Cloud implementation is a worldwide project and for countries that use the same currency (example: EUR, GBP) and requiring different sources for exchange rate declarations, Alternative Exchange Rate solution would not work.

We will have many rollouts to different countries, using the same currency (Example: GBP, EUR, USD), in case more than 2 countries use alternative exchange rate types, it would work only for one country. In this case, alternative exchange rate is a huge problem to be used because multiple countries use the same currency as their company code currency but use different sources for exchange rate conversions alternative exchange rate usage will only work for 1 of them, not for all.   

Example: Serbia, Turkey, Bulgaria have a legal requirement to use their own national banks as an exchange rates provider, and Reuters is setup for type M as a default provider for the countries already active in the system. By adding a new country we will be obliged to exclude this countries' ratios from Reuters. At some point, this will make a mess and will be hard to monitor.

Please provide us any tips, tricks, advices.

entry.title: No Shipping Tab in newly created document type for Returns by Copying NB / NB2
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have successfully configured all the necessary prerequisites to enable the shipping tab for Returns Purchase Orders (PO) within our SAP system. These configurations have proven effective for the predefined SAP document types NB and NB2.

1. Assigned shipping points.
2. Configured delivery type and availability check procedures by plant.
3. Defined shipping data for plants.
4. Ensured that the customer role in business partners (BP) is maintained, with the "Return Supplier" field appropriately checked.

However, our requirements necessitate the creation of a customized document type for Return POs. To accommodate this, I copied the NB document type and created a new one. Following this, I configured the "Configure delivery type and availability check procedures by Plant," as it is related to the document type.

Regrettably, despite these efforts, the shipping tab does not appear for the newly created document type. A similar issue arose when attempting the same process with a document type created by copying NB2.


Q1. Are there any additional configurations required to enable the shipping tab in Returns POs? I note that in Private cloud/On-Premise environments, there exists a configuration activity as "Returns to Supplier," where delivery types for Returns are specified. However, I could not locate a similar configuration activity in the Public cloud environment.

Q2. Is it advisable to solely utilize the NB or NB2 document types for the Return to Supplier process? Or is it possible and recommended to create a new document type specifically for Return POs?

Thanks,

Sabarinathan K
